channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Agentic AI Hackathon with OpenClaw (Prizes and pizza!)
item.description: Join us on Saturday, June 6th, for a beginner-friendly hackathon exploring AI agents on OpenClaw - an open-source platform for building, running, and orchestrating AI agents that can reason through problems, use tools, and complete multi-step tasks, all using natural language. This event is hosted by Tetherless World Constellation in collaboration with GRAIL (https://grailai.io). Pizza and prizes included. Registration is required.
item.author: Students

item.title: JEC East-Side Elevated Walkway Closure – Effective May 26
item.description: Starting May 26, the east-side elevated walkway and underpass between the Darrin Communications Center (DCC) and Jonsson Engineering Center (JEC) are closed for construction. Alternate pedestrian routes are in place, and wayfinding signage has been installed.
item.author: Community

item.title: Spring 2026 End of Term Student Course Evaluations: Reviewing Evaluation Results (Training for Instructors and TAs) Webinar
item.description: Date: Wednesday, June 3, 2026 12:00 PM - 1:00 PM - This webinar is for instructors and TA’s that would like to understand or have a refresher of the various ways to review their student course evaluations in HelioCampus.
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Division of Human Resources Professional Development Leadercamp: “Balancing Work and Life in an Always-On World” June 16, 2026 - 9AM-10AM or 12PM-1PM
item.description:
In today’s always-on world, there is an expectation of constant availability, leaving little room for rest, recovery, or even a moment to think. Over time, that relentless pressure takes a real toll, burnout is often the result. Boundary expert Terri Cole explains the importance of boundaries and how to identify where they are needed, with practical strategies for protecting your energy & building a more sustainable way of working & living without sacrificing your leadership or…

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
